title: 10 Herbal Tinctures For Burns
description: Hypericum perforatum tinctures contains bioactive constituents like hyperforin, emodin, and rutin. These compounds have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties that can help reduce the severity of burns by minimizing tissue damage and promoting healing. Hyperforin, in particular, has been shown to inhibit the production of pro-inflammatory enzymes that contribute to burn damage.
